---
title: "NFL"
subtitle: "Football data ingestion and grade reports"
---

## Season Grade Reports

Each report below is a self-contained R/Quarto template — open the `.qmd` source, change the team/player/season in the settings block at the top, and re-render to generate a new report.

- [Team Grade Report](grade-team.html) — defaults to the Kansas City Chiefs, 2024
- [Player Grade Report](grade-player.html) — defaults to Patrick Mahomes, 2024

## Team Reports

<div class="team-grid">

  <a class="team-card" data-name="kansas city chiefs" href="kansas-city-chiefs/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#E31837; color:#ffffff;">KC</div>
    <span class="team-name">Kansas City Chiefs</span>
    <span class="team-meta">AFC West</span>
  </a>

</div>

## Data Ingestion

Team and player season data is pulled via the `nflreadr` package:

- `pipeline/nfl/01_ingest_team.R`
- `pipeline/nfl/02_ingest_player.R`
